news.t: This ETF strategy could help risk-averse investors ride out wild market swings

holdings.infoBox: RSPA is an equity ETF with a total of 525 individual holdings. The top holdings are Invesco Premier U.S. Government Money Portfolio Institutional Class stock at 18.28%, Sandisk at 0.43%, Dell Technologies at 0.38%, Intel at 0.37%, and TORONTO-DOMINION BANK ELN 6/24/2026 at 0.37%.

overview.description: The Invesco S&P 500 Equal Weight Income Advantage ETF (RSPA) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is an actively managed, fund-of-funds, that utilizes equity securities and ETFs to mirror the S&P 500 Equal Weight Index. The fund also employs an options-based income strategy with equity-linked notes (ELNs) for upside participation and downside protection RSPA was launched on Jul 17, 2024 and is issued by Invesco.

data.title: This ETF strategy could help risk-averse investors ride out wild market swings
data.text: Invesco senior portfolio manager John Burrello sees income funds that employ options-based strategies as a suitable approach.
